title: At a Glance
description: Resource pack to help you see your items a part... *at a glance*!
body:
_You can finally tell your items apart..._
# At a Glance!

This resource pack adds brand new textures to existing items based on their finer details in a vanilla friendly manner.


## Tool Enchantments
![Swords have unique textures based on what enchantments they have](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b307513459428e20269bdcca40be8ad8bc0c514.gif)

Easily tell your enchanted weapons and tools apart with unique textures based on what enchantments they have! If the tool contains multiple enchantments, more textures are overlayed ontop, making each enchantment combination look unique!

<details>
<summary>Progress</summary>

- [✅] Sword Variants
- [🚧] Axe Variants
- [🚧] Pickaxe Variants
- [🚧] Shovel Variants
- [🚧] Fishing Rod Variants
- [🚧] Trident Variants
- [🚧] Mace Variants
- [🚧] Bow Variants
- [🚧] Crossbow Variants
- [🚧] Helmet Variants
- [🚧] Turtle Shell Variants
- [🚧] Chestplate Variants
- [🚧] Leggings Variants
- [🚧] Boots Variants
- [🚧] Elytra Variants

</details>

## Enchanted books
![All treasure enchantments and all the max level 1 enchantments have unique textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a538ea4e9370c9ab9bcb2b7e95b8201ad64b81db.png)

No longer struggle telling your enchanted books apart! Enchanted books change texture depending on what enchantments are stored inside. In case where the enchanted book contains multiple enchantments, the textures will be prioritised in following order:
1. Treasure enchantments (Mending, Soul Speed, Swift Sneak, etc)
2. Max Level 1 enchantments (Infinity, Silk Touch, etc)
3. Max Level 2 enchantments (Knockback, Fire Aspect, etc)
4. Max Level 3 enchantments (Luck of the sea, Fortune, etc)
5. Max Level 4 enchantments (Protection, Breach, etc)
6. Max Level 5 enchantments (Sharpness, Efficiency, etc)

*The order is subject to change based on feedback*

- [🚧] Fortune
- [🚧] Riptide
- [🚧] Sweeping Edge
- [🚧] Looting

## Potion contents
![Potions have unique textures based on the potency of the potion and by the type of potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea95f775da2df83cf5021fb578aae0a5a38d5c7.gif)

Spot enhanced (Level 2) and extended (Longer duration) potions ***at a glance*** from the thicker and thinner potion bottle designs! Tell the different effects apart with their unique animated visuals.

<details>
<summary>Progress</summary>

- [✅] Enhanced Potion Variant
- [✅] Extended Potion Variant
- [✅] Swiftness Animation
- [✅] Leaping Animation
- [✅] Slowness Animation
- [✅] Night Vision Animation
- [🚧] Invisibility Animation
- [🚧] Fire Resistance Animation
- [🚧] Water Breathing Animation
- [🚧] Instant Health Animation
- [🚧] Harming Animation
- [🚧] Poison Animation
- [🚧] Regeneration Animation
- [🚧] Strength Animation
- [🚧] Weakness Animation
- [🚧] Luck Animation
- [🚧] Turtle Master Animation
- [🚧] Slow Falling Animation
- [🚧] Infestation Animation
- [🚧] Oozing Animation
- [🚧] Weaving Animation
- [🚧] Wind Charged Animation
- [🚧] Ominous bottle variants

</details>

## Other additions
Minor additions this pack also includes

### Tropical Fish bucket textures
![All 12 types of tropical fish in a bucket have unique textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2896b3f068837afb5e65f25c5dec5617d575c6.png)

Each of the 12 different types of tropical fish patterns have their own unique textures and support all color variations.

### Axolotl bucket textures
![All 5 axolotl variants have unique texture when in a bucket.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba811d3bae70c5458a5d1d1376f340ae83b443ca.png)

### Explorer map textures
![Explorer maps include an icon of the exploration target on the top left.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08f911d9622b8c88f5e329005d83ebf8c9decbcd.png)

Spot explorer map target... at a glance! Each explorer map has the icon of the target visible on the item texture.

### Name tag textures
![Blank name tag texture and a unique texture for each of the easter eggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f690eaa81c45c502a38729384c2ff3fb3f4f46b2.png)

Blank name tag has a unique texture. If the nametag name is one of the easter egg names they also contain a unique texture.

## Future Plans
There are a lot of other textures I'd love to add to the pack but which are lower priority or still being planned out on how it would work. These include:


<details>
<summary>Planned additions</summary>

- Tipped arrow textures
- Unique textures for max enchant items
  - Currently maxed out swords look too busy to my liking. Maybe should add a texture override to the textures once it detects the tool has max enchants.
- Firework variants based on flight duration
- Firework + Firework Star variants based on explosion contents
- Damaged Enchanted Tool variants (100%, 90%, 50% and 30% durability)
  - This might be impossible due to how many different textures there already are.
- Entity tool variants
  - It is possible to make texture variants to tools and weapons based on which mob is holding it. Could be interesting for example to make skeleton bows more bone textured etc.
- Lodestone compass variant
- Writable / Written book variants based off number of pages they have
- Suspicious Stew variants based on effect
- Goat horn instrument textures
  - Be able to tell which sound the goat horn makes ***at a glance***
- Infested block inventory marker
- Matching trim pattern textures on equipment items

</details>

<details>
<summary>Currently impossible to add but would love to when possible</summary>

- Shield enchantment variant textures
- Equipped armor enchantment variant textures
  - In Vanilla minecraft it is currently not possible to change equipped armor textures dynamically based on enchantments.
- Thrown trident projectile variant based on enchantments
- Fired arrow projectile variants based on potion effects

</details>
